mapper.select: SELECT * FROM msg_user_inbox WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_user_inbox SET user_id = #{userId}, message_id = #{messageId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_read = #{isRead}, read_time = #{readTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, message_id, title, content, is_read, read_time, created_time FROM msg_user_inbox WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
